# Contribution
This repository is still in early development, and many of the essential utilities
of contribution workflows are still not in place. Upcoming revisions will see the inclusion
of complete documentation, unit tests and a formal PR workflow.

The repository is however, opening up discussions in order to facilitate issue reporting,
along with Q&A to provide support within the community. Your input will help shape the
direction and utility of SubConsole.

Community input will be reviewed regularly, and all comments are valued, 
but development resources are limited, so please be patient with responses and resolutions.

## SubApplications
SubConsole intends to be a build-your-own tool space. For that reason, with the exception 
of SubApplications which are considered essential to continued or extended core functionality,
SubApplications will not be considered for contribution to this repository in order to provide 
a minimal template from which to build a customized toolkit.

While intending to provide this repository as a blank template, the design fully supports 
sharing of SubApplications, and sharing will likely be implemented through a registry-type system
in another repository. A *discussion* will soon be open on this topic and community input will 
be a valuable contribution to it's design and implementation.

## Issues

An **issues** category will be provided in `Discussions` for issue reporting until the workflow has
been formalized. Until such time, please consider GitHub's *Issues* tab *inactive* for this repository.

If you're unsure if it's an *issue*, try fielding a question in *Q&A*.

Please try to describe the issue clearly and accurately. Include details like OS version,
actual vs expected behavior, code snippets, or traceback samples. 

Issues will be added manually to `development/issues.md` until templates are established.

## Q&A

A **Q&A** category will be opened for the purpose of community discussion about the project.
This will be where members of the community can ask for help and share knowledge.

Please keep discussions on-topic, civil, and constructive.

None of us have all of the answers, but together we can improve our shared understanding.

## Abstract

The category **Abstract** will be added as a *suggestion box* for expansion and design.
Whether it's a wishlist feature, or you've found something that isn't an issue but rather
an opportunity for improvement, the abstract category provides a home for these types of discussions.


## Pull Requests

Pull Requests aren't yet configured, more details will be provided when ready. 

New work will be merged on the **Develop** branch, and categories have been determined for 
working branches:
- **docs/\<feature>**: For development of documentation. 
- **console/\<feature>**: For development related to the main application scope.
- **apps/\<feature>**: For development related to the SubApplication scope.
